name: Horrut

sheet.name: Horrut
sheet.background_story:
A group of thugs raided his parents' camp and after murdering everyone they took him and other children as slaves. As soon as possible he was sold as a servant to another group of thugs from which he freed himself by poisoning all the members while they slept. Since then he has wandered the world killing to survive and considering death as his daily bread.
He has a nasty fixation for getting blood on himself and doesn't like secrets.
